description: Rise of Avalon Patch 12 (13 January 2021) — Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Changes

subsections.heading: Silver

items.text: Lowered global amount of Silver generated by the Black Market by 15%
Increased Silver drops from all non-Expedition mobs by 15%

subsections.searchable_text: Silver Lowered global amount of Silver generated by the Black Market by 15% Increased Silver drops from all non-Expedition mobs by 15%

subsections.heading: Satchels of Insight, Tomes of Insight, and Respec

items.text: Increased cost per Respec Fame Credit from 0.75 to 0.9 Silver
Decreased the Silver cost of Fame from Satchels of Insight across all tiers by 30%
Decreased the amount of Tomes of Insight dropped by mobs by 10%
Increased Fame gain from Satchels of Insight by 10%

subsections.searchable_text: Satchels of Insight, Tomes of Insight, and Respec Increased cost per Respec Fame Credit from 0.75 to 0.9 Silver Decreased the Silver cost of Fame from Satchels of Insight across all tiers by 30% Decreased the amount of Tomes of Insight dropped by mobs by 10% Increased Fame gain from Satchels of Insight by 10%

subsections.heading: Corrupted Dungeons

items.text: Increased amount of rare and legendary loot chests appearing in Corrupted Dungeons, but reduced number of rare and legendary book chests accordingly

Decreased value of boss chests in Stalker and Slayer dungeons by 17.5%, but increased the percentage of boss loot received when killing another player from 50% to 100%. This change is intended to promote PvP in Corrupted Dungeons.

subsections.searchable_text: Corrupted Dungeons Increased amount of rare and legendary loot chests appearing in Corrupted Dungeons, but reduced number of rare and legendary book chests accordingly Decreased value of boss chests in Stalker and Slayer dungeons by 17.5%, but increased the percentage of boss loot received when killing another player from 50% to 100%. This change is intended to promote PvP in Corrupted Dungeons.

subsections.heading: Smart Cluster Queue

items.text: Updated deactivation conditions: the queue can now be deactivated in the middle of an update cycle if player numbers allow
Players will no longer be able to skip overcrowded clusters within the first 2 minutes of queue activation

subsections.searchable_text: Smart Cluster Queue Updated deactivation conditions: the queue can now be deactivated in the middle of an update cycle if player numbers allow Players will no longer be able to skip overcrowded clusters within the first 2 minutes of queue activation

subsections.heading: Mobile

items.text: Reduced default graphics resolution on Android and iOS; graphical quality can still be adjusted as usual in Settings

subsections.searchable_text: Mobile Reduced default graphics resolution on Android and iOS; graphical quality can still be adjusted as usual in Settings

subsections.heading: Other Changes

items.text: Duels now end in a draw when either player is removed from an island or Hideout
A chat message is now sent when the territory commander in an owned territory is under attack

subsections.searchable_text: Other Changes Duels now end in a draw when either player is removed from an island or Hideout A chat message is now sent when the territory commander in an owned territory is under attack

sections.searchable_text: Changes Silver Lowered global amount of Silver generated by the Black Market by 15% Increased Silver drops from all non-Expedition mobs by 15% Satchels of Insight, Tomes of Insight, and Respec Increased cost per Respec Fame Credit from 0.75 to 0.9 Silver Decreased the Silver cost of Fame from Satchels of Insight across all tiers by 30% Decreased the amount of Tomes of Insight dropped by mobs by 10% Increased Fame gain from Satchels of Insight by 10% Corrupted Dungeons Increased amount of rare and legendary loot chests appearing in Corrupted Dungeons, but reduced number of rare and legendary book chests accordingly Decreased value of boss chests in Stalker and Slayer dungeons by 17.5%, but increased the percentage of boss loot received when killing another player from 50% to 100%. This change is intended to promote PvP in Corrupted Dungeons. Smart Cluster Queue Updated deactivation conditions: the queue can now be deactivated in the middle of an update cycle if player numbers allow Players will no longer be able to skip overcrowded clusters within the first 2 minutes of queue activation Mobile Reduced default graphics resolution on Android and iOS; graphical quality can still be adjusted as usual in Settings Other Changes Duels now end in a draw when either player is removed from an island or Hideout A chat message is now sent when the territory commander in an owned territory is under attack

sections.heading: Fixes

items.text: Fixed an issue where Smart Cluster Queue UI sometimes showed incorrect distance to exit
Emergency Heal (Guardian Helmet) now affects a maximum of 5 targets (including caster) as intended
Fixed an issue where dashes/pulls/knockbacks would sometimes interact incorrectly with ground spell effects (such as Firewall)
Onslaught (Hand of Justice)

subitems.text: Size of damage radius now matches that of other effect radii while spinning (3.5m)
Maximum number of targets is now the same for pull, stun and damage while spinning (10 enemies)

items.text: Vile Curse (Cursed Staffs) now triggers AoE escalation (for example via Area of Decay) as intended
Tier 5 and 7 Rock Elementals have relearned their Tremor spell
Additional graphical, animation, audio, terrain, and localization fixes
